name: PySpector
description: Imports Python SAST findings from PySpector (ParzivalHack/PySpector) — a fast Rust-cored static analyzer that scans Python code/repos for security vulnerabilities, hardcoded secrets, config errors, taint flows, LLM-specific issues and supply-chain CVEs. Offline mode parses a PySpector JSON or SARIF report; live mode runs `pyspector scan <path|--url repo>` if the binary is on the worker PATH. The scanned project/repo becomes an ASSET and each finding (rule + severity, CWE/CVE when present) becomes a VULNERABILITY. Worker-safe (no DB).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to a PySpector report to import (JSON or SARIF: `pyspector scan <path> --format json -o out.json`).

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Live mode: a path or Git repo URL to scan with the local `pyspector` binary.

parameters.name: project
parameters.help: Project / asset name for the scanned codebase (defaults to the target/repo name).
